title: catabrosa × werdermannii
intro: Catabrosa × werdermannii, also known as the Werdermann's sedge, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Catabrosa × werdermannii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to release its active compounds.
